# React UI (@splunk/react-ui)

A library of UI components, all independent of the Splunk Enterprise environment.

## Base

- **Anchor**
- **Avatar**
- **Badge**
- **Button**
- **Card**
- **Card Layout**
- **Chip**
- **Code**
- **Collapsible Panel**
- **Drawer**
- **JSON Tree**
- **Link**
- **Markdown**
- **Modal**
- **Paginator**
- **Progress**
- **Split Button**
- **Step Bar**
- **Switch**
- **Tab Bar**
- **Tab Layout**
- **Table**
- **Tooltip**
- **Wait Spinner**

## Content

- **Definition List**
- **Heading**
- **List**
- **Paragraph**
- **Prose**
- **Typography**

## Data Entry

- **Checkbox**
- **Color**
- **Combo Box**
- **Control Group**
- **Date**
- **Dual Listbox**
- **File**
- **Form Rows**
- **Image**
- **Multiselect**
- **Number**
- **Phone Number**
- **Radio Bar**
- **Radio List**
- **Select**
- **Search**
- **Slider**
- **Static Content**
- **Text**
- **Text Area**

## Navigation

- **Anchor Menu**
- **Breadcrumbs**

## Notifications

- **Notifications**
- **Message**
- **Message Bar**

## Utilities

- **AnimationToggle**
- **Button Group**
- **Clickable**
- **Column Layout**
- **Divider**
- **Dropdown**
- **Layer**
- **Layout**
- **Menu**
- **Popover**
- **Resize**
- **Screen Reader Content**
- **Scroll**
- **Scroll Container Context**
- **Side Panel**
- **Sliding Panels**
- **Transition Open**
- **Tree**
- **useKeyPress**

## Deprecated

- **Accordion**
- **Monogram**
